posts.author: jpelrman87 (Josh Perlman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We want to connect an item form another board as the main item on a different board. Then have mirror columns against that column

What are you trying to achieve

We have a column of freelancers when we add them to projects we want to pull info from them into the board but also just have their name be the main item so it’s super easy to see.
